title: 10 best herbal creams for bitter taste in mouth
description: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, creams helps with bitter taste in mouth because of its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The herb's active compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids, help to soothe and calm the mucous membranes in the mouth. This reduces inflammation and kills bacteria that can cause bad breath and bitter taste.
